---
title: "Hornet Cooked by Bees"
description: "Smart Japanese honeybees defending their colony with heat."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-05-09"
categories: [video, science, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Hornet cooked by bees. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/K6m40W1s0Wc)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Smart Japanese honeybees!

<https://lnkd.in/gsm2QXa>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_hornet-cooked-by-bees-activity-6664721161697533952-zRUs).*
